# NodeLabels Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

*   JSON representation

Collection of node-level Kubernetes labels.

JSON representation

{
  "labels": {
    string: string,
    ...
  }
}

 

Fields

`labels`

`map (key: string, value: string)`

Map of node label keys and node label values.
